characters.name: Aaron Carter
characters.description: Aaron Charles Carter(December 7, 1987 – November 5, 2022) was an American singer and rapper. He came to fame as a teen pop singer in the late 1990s, establishing himself as a star among preteen and teenage audiences during the first years of the 21st century, with his four studio albums. He appeared inSaturday Night with a Slight Fever, where tookNoah Ellis,Brian McGoffandTaylor Garron.

characters.name: Alyssa Goodman
characters.description: Alyssa Ann Goodman(born July 1, 1962) is the Robert Wheeler Willson Professor of Applied Astronomy at Harvard University, former co-director for Science at the Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study, Research Associate of the Smithsonian Institution, and the founding director of the Harvard Initiative in Innovative Computing. She appeared in "Is It a Bird? Is It a Plane? It's...Ruffmanman!"

characters.name: Alyssa Goodman
characters.description: Alyssa Ann Goodman(born July 1, 1962) is the Robert Wheeler Willson Professor of Applied Astronomy at Harvard University, former co-director for Science at the Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study, Research Associate of the Smithsonian Institution, and the founding director of the Harvard Initiative in Innovative Computing. characters.name: Amanda Bickerstaff
characters.description: Amanda is the Founder and CEO of AI for Education. A former high school biology teacher and edtech executive with over 20 years of experience in the education sector, she has a deep understanding of the challenges and opportunities that AI can offer. She is a frequent consultant, speaker, and writer on the topic of AI in education, leading workshops and professional learning across both K12 and Higher Ed. Amanda is committed to helping schools and teachers maximize their potential through the ethical and equitable adoption of AI. In late 2025, she was interviewed byRuffin an episode of the web seriesRuff Ruffman: Content Creatorabout how to use AI safely, ethically, and effectively.

characters.name: Anette Hosoi
characters.description: Anette E."Peko"Hosoiis an American mechanical engineer, biophysicist, and mathematician, currently the Neil and Jane Pappalardo Professor of Mechanical Engineering and associate dean of engineering at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. She appeared in two episodes ofFetch! With Ruff Ruffman; "Gearing Up for Getting Ruff's Goat", and "Eureka is Not a Brand of Dog Food".

characters.name: Anna Sheridan
characters.description: Anna SheridanName:Anna Mae SheridanBorn:December 5, 1990 (age 35)Birthplace:Lexington, MassachusettsSeason:1Placeholder:1 Anna Mae Sheridan(born December 5, 1990) is aSeason 1contestant, as well as the oldest Fetcher at 14 years old. She was also the Season 1 Grand Champion. She brings maturity and some amazing, advanced math skills to the group. She's also a real animal lover; hence, she has six chickens, eleven mice and two cats as pets with one of them being a three-legged cat named Arthur.. She is also talented. She can speak Spanish, play the cello, handbells, harvest 20,000 tomatoes and three cucumbers, climb trees and hang a spoon on her nose. Her pet peeve is when people hold out their S's and hates the smell of burning hair. Surprisingly, a moth once accidently flew into her mouth. The person she respects the most is her grandmother.

characters.name: Archie Stewart
characters.description: Archie Stewart is one of the most respected kite flyers in New England. He is an Eastern League Champion and the winner of the Newport Cup for the highest scoring champion at the 2014 Newport Kite Festival. He appeared in "Cats? I Thought You Said Kites!".

characters.name: Bethany Owens
characters.description: Bethany OwensName:Bethany Imara OwensBorn:November 5, 1996 (age 29)Birthplace:Roslindale,MassachusettsSeason:4Placeholder:6 Bethany Imara Owens(born November 5, 1996) is aSeason 4contestant. She was 11 years old when she appeared on the show, as well as having the shortest height. Her pets include a lizard named Tooey, a dog named Twix, and a snail. Her favorite foods are sushi, Spanish rice, and lots of Southern food. She loves karate and hopes to someday break a cement block with her bare hand; and is described by her friends to be a funny person. Her other talents include rollerblades, racing, mimicking other people, writing books, singing, and even spy! She says her worst habit is fidgeting and wishes refrigerators didn't hum so loudly. She would like to be a doctor when she grows up. She hopes to go to France for shopping because she admires the French people for the ways they handle pollution. She can also speak Spanish and is fluent in Pig Latin (Bethany - Ethany-Bay).

characters.name: Blair Imani
characters.description: Blair Imani(bornBlair Elizabeth Brown, October 31, 1993) is an American author, historian, and educator. She is queer, Black, and Muslim. Since 2020 she has been known for creating and hosting the viral web seriesSmarter in Seconds. In previous years, she came to popularity after her involvement with the Black Lives Matter movement and her unlawful arrest  while protesting the shooting of Alton Sterling. She also participated in protesting Executive Order 13769. In October 2025, Blair was interviewed byRuffin an episode of the web seriesRuff Ruffman: Content Creatorabout brand identity and online authenticity.

characters.name: Blossom
characters.description: BlossomGeneral InformationFull NamePrincess Blossom Pepper Doodle Von Yum YumGenderFemaleSpeciesCatOccupationSupervisor of FETCH! (Former)Relationships/RelativesRelationshipsRuff Ruffman,Chet(Employees)RelativesLe Purr(Twin Sister)AppearancesFirst AppearnaceRuff Ruffman Breaks the MoldLatest Appearance"That'll Work!" Music Video  Blossomis a selectively mute black cat who isRuff's Supervisor. She first appeared at the start ofSeason 2in which she starts out as Ruff's intern. She is the 'straight man' to Ruff andChet, being smarter than the both of them. She is currently Ruff's supervisor, but not the station. She is smart, loyal, and a problem solver. She is very neat, nice, and organized. Ruff refers to her orChetas the best assistant ever. Blossom is one of Henry's favorite employees. Blossom has been shown with colors like lavender and pink. It is also believed that she kind of likes flowers. Blossom is sultry, smart, loyal, and a problem solver, but she is also very stern of others and perfectly organized. She is very neat, nice, and organized As seen in most episodes, she is seen taking notes on her laptop. She was promoted to supervisor in Season 3. She is also seen with hardly a laugh because of her stern-ness.

characters.name: Blue Man Group
characters.description: American performance art company formed in 1987. It is known for their stage productions that incorporate many kinds of music and art, both popular and obscure. It is performers, known as Blue Gentlemen, have their skin painted blue. They are mute during shows and always appear in groups of three. The company has continued shows in Berlin, Boston, Chicago, Las Vegas, and New York City. A typical production employ seven to nine full-time Blue Gentlemen are selected by audition. In addition to their stage shows has toured nationally and internationally, appeared on television programs as characters and performers, released multiple studio albums, contributed to a number of film scores, and performed with orchestras around the United States. They appeared inRuff's Case of Blues in the Brain, where tookMadi BaderandWillie Bornkessel.

characters.name: Bobby Smithney
characters.description: Bobby Smithney is a comedian and puppeteer in the Boston area as a member of the now defunct ImprovBoston, as well as the voice of Fast Food Freddy in the PBS KIDS web seriesFizzy's Lunch Lab. He appeared in "How to Break the Ice and Also Waddle On It".

characters.name: Brian Conry
characters.description: Brian ConryName:Brian Edward ConryBorn:October 17, 1996 (Age 29)Birthplace:Wakefield, MassachusettsSeason:4Placeholder:5 Brian Edward Conry(born October 17, 1996) is aSeason 4contestant. He was 11 years old when he appeared on the show. He has a dog named Pizza Boy who can sit like a human on a couch. His interests include sculptures, wiffle basketball, puzzles, hula hoops, canoeing, kayaking, video games, telling jokes and even microscopes. He says he can cook anything if he has the recipe. His favorite foods are macaroni and cheese, steak, and ice cream sundaes. His favorite smell is sizzling bacon. However, he is not a fan of cilantro, parsley, or raw salmon. Unlike most kids, he'd be glad to do chores, except he hates to clean the bathroom. He plays hockey with his whole family and can tell a slap shot from a hat trick. LikeNoah, he has a habit of biting his nails. Believe it or not, he once had to perform a play while in his boxers. He hopes to go bungee jumping and travel to Italy because his ancestors came from there. He says his sister is super supportive and his biggest fan! Hmpf, that's more than he can say for Scruff.

characters.name: Brian McGoff
characters.description: Brian McGoffName:Brian Joseph McGoffBorn:January 28, 1993 (Age 33)Birthplace:Medford, MassachusettsSeason:1Placeholder:5 Brian Joseph McGoff(born January 28, 1993) is aSeason 1contestant. He was 12 years old when he appeared on the show. He is interests include chocolate chip ice cream, waffles, rock music, tubing, and water balloon fights. He is less enthusiastic about asparagus, hot peppers, math tests, and the dentist's office. He plays the guitar and is an MVP in both hockey and basketball. He can speak French, as well as speak in an Irish accent. He has a cat named Sam who just sits around and doesn't do anything.

characters.name: Bridget O'Sullivan
characters.description: Bridget O'SullivanName:Bridget Mary O'SullivanBorn:January 22, 1993 (age 33)Birthplace:Grafton,MassachusettsSeason:2Placeholder:3 Bridget Mary O'Sullivan(born January 22, 1993) is a Season 2 contestant. She was 13 years old when appeared on the show. She is an expert hula hooper, skateboarder, rollerblader, and swimmer, but never tried a unicycle. She's an athlete, and more importantly, is good at impressions and has a hobby of taking photos. She loves to save money and brag about it. She wishes could ski jump her way to a world record.  If she had to be an animal, chooses to be a lion. Unlike most children, she doesn't mind making her bed. She loves rhythm and blues as well as the smell of cinnamon. However, she doesn't like peanut butter.

characters.name: Carol Buckley
characters.description: Carol Buckley(born May 18, 1954) is an American elephant caregiver, specializing in the trauma recovery and on-going physical care of captive elephants. In 1995, Buckley realized a decades long dream and retired her elephant, Tarra, to their private farm in Hohenwald, Tennessee, which later became The Elephant Sanctuary in Tennessee. In 2010, Buckley founded Elephant Aid International, and began consulting worldwide to help improve the lives of captive elephants and their mahouts. She appeared in the episode "Ruff Follows His Dream".

characters.name: Chet
characters.description: ChetGeneral InformationGenderMaleSpeciesMouseOccupationInternRelationships/RelativesRelationshipsRuff Ruffman,Blossom(Supervisors)AppearancesFirst AppearnaceWhen Home is a House of CardsLatest AppearanceHumble Media Genius: Ruff Amuck  ChetisRuff's assistant inFETCH! with Ruff Ruffman. He mainly lives in a pad inside theFETCH 3000. Chet appears to be a very smart and clever mouse. Unfortunately, Chet isn't very bright with grammar, idioms. and hyperboles, as he misunderstood and misheard Ruff's commands, causing more chaos for him. For example, Ruff asked Chet to mail his college term paper so it could be graded, but Chet mistakes the word for grated, and literally destroys the entire paper with a cheese grater. Another classic mishap happened when Chet think the holiday "Boxing Day" is about the sport boxing and impulsively booked Ruff in a match against a burly boxing champion. One of his most dangerous misunderstandings was when Ruff asked Chet to take away a massive bag of kibble after it got soggy with water, exaggerating to "burn it". However, Chet takes the exaggeration literally and puts the bag in a building scheduled for demolition by fire. This results inNoel, who's in the firefighting challenge being sent to the burning building just after the demolishers had set it alight, extinguishing the fire, and getting the bag out before the demolition could continue.

characters.name: Cosmin Marculetiu
characters.description: Cosmin Marculetiu is a native Transylvanian from Sibiu, Romania. At age 9, Cosmin was discovered in a nation-wide search for artistic talents and accepted into the Academy of Arts and Choreography in Cluj-Napoca, RO. He completed the Academy with honors, and also received certification in pedagogy and choreography. After graduating, Cosmin was engaged as a soloist with the Romanian National Ballet in Cluj-Napoca, RO and the touring company Europe Ballet. He continued his professional dance career with the Croatian National Ballet in Croatia’s capital, Zagreb. Cosmin danced in various productions and commercials produced by Zagrebacka Televizija, which was the leading television network in Croatia. In 1992 he was engaged as a soloist with the Landesbuhnen Sachsen in Radebeul (Dresden), Germany where he danced for 10 years. The Sachische Zeitung and The Morgen Post followed his dance career and published many excellent reviews and articles about his life and performances. Cosmin has established himself as a master ballet instructor in New England and the East Coast since his arrival to the USA in 2002. He was on the dance faculty of the Boston Arts Academy, and was an artistic associate at Jose Mateo’s Ballet Theatre, where he coached, taught, and rehearsed students and company members. He appeared in "Finding Eight-Legged Tights Isn't Easy".

He continued his professional dance career with the Croatian National Ballet in Croatia’s capital, Zagreb. Cosmin danced in various productions and commercials produced by Zagrebacka Televizija, which was the leading television network in Croatia. In 1992 he was engaged as a soloist with the Landesbuhnen Sachsen in Radebeul (Dresden), Germany where he danced for 10 years. The Sachische Zeitung and The Morgen Post followed his dance career and published many excellent reviews and articles about his life and performances. Cosmin has established himself as a master ballet instructor in New England and the East Coast since his arrival to the USA in 2002. He was on the dance faculty of the Boston Arts Academy, and was an artistic associate at Jose Mateo’s Ballet Theatre, where he coached, taught, and rehearsed students and company members. He appeared in "Finding Eight-Legged Tights Isn't Easy".

characters.name: Crush
characters.description: Crushis a sea turtle and a supporting character in Disney/Pixar's 2003 animated film,Finding Nemoand its 2016 sequel,Finding Dory. He appears in the episode "The Ol' Shell Game" as a friend ofRuff's. Ruff gives him a call to wish him a happy birthday, during which Crush tells Ruff about trouble happening with sea turtles, so Ruff sendsMarcoandShreyato learn about them. At the end of the episode, Crush thanks them for helping and says it was the best birthday present ever.
